basic_details.job_title: TNSRLM Kanchipuram Resource Trainer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Tamil Nadu State Rural Livelihoods Mission Kanchipuram (TNSRLM Kanchipuram)
basic_details.short_information: Tamil Nadu State Rural Livelihoods Mission Kanchipuram (TNSRLM Kanchipuram) has officially announced the Resource Trainers Recruitment 2026 with a total of 7 vacancies. The detailed notification was published in 2026 on its official communication channels.

age_limit.age_details: State WTI: 30-45 years; District WTI: 30-45 years; Block WTI: 25-45 years.
age_limit.details: State WTI: 30-45 years District WTI: 30-45 years Block WTI: 25-45 years

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate in Social Education / Social Science / Rural Development / Women's Education or Social Work, Any Post Graduate Degree, Any Graduate Degree
qualification.details: State Resource Trainer: Post Graduate in Social Education / Social Science / Rural Development / Women's Education or Social Work District Resource Trainer: Any Post Graduate Degree Block Resource Trainer: Any Graduate Degree

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for TNSRLM Kanchipuram Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://tncdw.org.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download TNSRLM Kanchipuram Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TNSRLM Kanchipuram Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the TNSRLM Kanchipuram Resource Trainers posts is 29th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Resource Trainers?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies for Resource Trainers posts in TNSRLM Kanchipuram.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for the Block Resource Trainer post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Block Resource Trainer post is Rs. 10,500/- per month (maximum).

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the State Resource Trainer post?
faq.answer: The educational qualification required for the State Resource Trainer post is a Post Graduate degree in Social Education, Social Science, Rural Development, Women's Education, or Social Work.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for the District Resource Trainer post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the District Resource Trainer post is between 30 to 45 years.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts includes a Written Test and an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website: https://tncdw.org.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of TNSRLM Kanchipuram?
faq.answer: The official website of TNSRLM Kanchipuram is https://tncdw.org.
